data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user choices to reduce decision time and enhance experience.
data.technical_spec: Implemented streamlined navigation and choice architecture.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: Design elements are optimized to reduce the time to interact based on size and distance.
data.technical_spec: Adjusted UI element sizes and spacing for optimal reachability.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits chunking of information to improve user understanding and retention.
data.technical_spec: Content divided into manageable sections with clear headers.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs intuitive interfaces based on familiar conventions from other web experiences.
data.technical_spec: Adopts common UI patterns and design heuristics.

data.title: Law of Prägnanz
data.description: Encourages interface simplicity and visual clarity to aid in perception.
data.technical_spec: Ensures consistent use of whitespace and minimalistic design principles.
